title: Crash on REPLACE INTO of a table with an AFTER DELETE trigger.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_monetdb_t0(a INT, b INT, c INT UNIQUE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX fuzz_monetdb_i0 ON fuzz_monetdb_t0(b) WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_monetdb_tr0 AFTER DELETE ON fuzz_monetdb_t0 FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE delete_from_fuzz_monetdb_t0();
key_bug_features: REPLACE INTO with AFTER DELETE trigger causes assertion fault
